description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time $75 credit card donation to a student emergency support campaign that specifically mentions housing or food insecurity.
tasks.name: Make a one-time $75 credit card donation to a student emergency support campaign that specifically mentions housing or food insecurity.
tasks.description: Make a one-time $75 credit card donation to a student emergency support campaign that specifically mentions housing or food insecurity.

tasks.instruction: Set up a $20 monthly recurring donation, processing on the 15th of each month, to an undergraduate scholarship fund that supports first-generation students and lists a minimum monthly amount of $20 or less.
tasks.name: Set up a $20 monthly recurring donation, processing on the 15th of each month, to an undergraduate scholarship fund that supports first-generation students and lists a minimum monthly amount of $20 or less.
tasks.description: Set up a $20 monthly recurring donation, processing on the 15th of each month, to an undergraduate scholarship fund that supports first-generation students and lists a minimum monthly amount of $20 or less.

tasks.instruction: Among research funds related to climate and to health, compare their minimum one-time donation amounts (under $50) and make a $40 one-time gift to whichever has the lower minimum.
tasks.name: Among research funds related to climate and to health, compare their minimum one-time donation amounts (under $50) and make a $40 one-time gift to whichever has the lower minimum.
tasks.description: Among research funds related to climate and to health, compare their minimum one-time donation amounts (under $50) and make a $40 one-time gift to whichever has the lower minimum.

tasks.instruction: Using the site's multi-fund giving tool, add three different funds—one in Athletics, one in Library, and one in Study Abroad—to a single checkout, with donation amounts of $25, $15, and $10 respectively.
tasks.name: Using the site's multi-fund giving tool, add three different funds—one in Athletics, one in Library, and one in Study Abroad—to a single checkout, with donation amounts of $25, $15, and $10 respectively.
tasks.description: Using the site's multi-fund giving tool, add three different funds—one in Athletics, one in Library, and one in Study Abroad—to a single checkout, with donation amounts of $25, $15, and $10 respectively.

tasks.instruction: Make a $50 one-time tribute donation to any academic department fund in honor of a professor, including a personalized e-card message for them.

expected_values.tribute_message: Thank you for your inspiring lectures and dedication to students.

tasks.name: Make a $50 one-time tribute donation to any academic department fund in honor of a professor, including a personalized e-card message for them.
tasks.description: Make a $50 one-time tribute donation to any academic department fund in honor of a professor, including a personalized e-card message for them.

tasks.instruction: Make a $60 one-time donation to a featured fundraising campaign and, using the employer matching search tool, designate an employer that offers a 2:1 match on eligible gifts.
tasks.name: Make a $60 one-time donation to a featured fundraising campaign and, using the employer matching search tool, designate an employer that offers a 2:1 match on eligible gifts.
tasks.description: Make a $60 one-time donation to a featured fundraising campaign and, using the employer matching search tool, designate an employer that offers a 2:1 match on eligible gifts.

tasks.instruction: Register for a campus 5K run/walk fundraising event held during Homecoming, purchasing two in-person participant tickets that include T-shirts (with sizes selected for each participant), and add an additional $30 donation directed to a fund supporting student wellness before checkout.
tasks.name: Register for a campus 5K run/walk fundraising event held during Homecoming, purchasing two in-person participant tickets that include T-shirts (with sizes selected for each participant), and add an additional $30 donation directed to a fund supporting student wellness before checkout.
tasks.description: Register for a campus 5K run/walk fundraising event held during Homecoming, purchasing two in-person participant tickets that include T-shirts (with sizes selected for each participant), and add an additional $30 donation directed to a fund supporting student wellness before checkout.

tasks.instruction: From the list of impact stories organized by department, choose a department whose impact summary highlights at least three student stories and make a $35 one-time donation to that department’s associated fund.
tasks.name: From the list of impact stories organized by department, choose a department whose impact summary highlights at least three student stories and make a $35 one-time donation to that department’s associated fund.
tasks.description: From the list of impact stories organized by department, choose a department whose impact summary highlights at least three student stories and make a $35 one-time donation to that department’s associated fund.

tasks.instruction: Sign in to your giving account, locate an active $15 monthly recurring pledge, and update it so the amount is $25 per month and the payment method is bank transfer instead of credit card.
tasks.name: Sign in to your giving account, locate an active $15 monthly recurring pledge, and update it so the amount is $25 per month and the payment method is bank transfer instead of credit card.
